betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The clanking of the hammer. The cracking of the flame.
Complexity, born from simplicity. A handful of elements, combined, arranged, to produce something that is more than just its ingredients. The emergence of strength, ductility, flexibility.
A process that is achieved through trial and error, extensive testing, and grueling work.
Heat, time, pressure. Over and over, till the material is honed to perfection.
The determination of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
